/opt/clang+llvm/clang+llvm-17.0.5/bin/clang++ -isysroot /Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/Platforms/MacOSX.platform/Developer/SDKs/MacOSX.sdk -isysroot /Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/Platforms/MacOSX.platform/Developer/SDKs/MacOSX.sdk -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names -L/Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/Platforms/MacOSX.platform/Developer/SDKs/MacOSX.sdk/usr/lib -L/Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/Platforms/MacOSX.platform/Developer/SDKs/MacOSX.sdk/usr/lib CMakeFiles/app.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/app.dir/src/glad.c.o -o app  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/lib /opt/homebrew/lib/libglfw.3.4.dylib -framework OpenGL
